prompt: {"type":"glassmorphism neumorphic smart dashboard UI kit","style":{"theme":"clean futuristic mobile interface components","background":"soft light gray-white","materials":"frosted glass, translucent acrylic, soft shadows, subtle inner glow, rounded corners, embossed and debossed details","accent color":"{argument name=\"accent color\" default=\"deep teal green\"}","secondary accent":"warm orange","lighting":"soft studio lighting from upper left, gentle ambient reflections, high polish","rendering":"ultra-detailed 3D UI mockup, premium dribbble-style product design"},"layout":{"canvas":"square composition","arrangement":"evenly spaced grid of isolated widgets and controls","density":"information-dense but balanced with generous white space","sections":[{"title":"top row controls","position":"top","count":6,"labels":["4-quadrant connectivity pad","analog clock","50% BATTERY circular gauge","24° Cloudy weather dial","compass","vertical temperature slider"]},{"title":"small circular shortcut buttons","position":"upper middle","count":11,"labels":["alarm","moon","mute bell","flashlight","location pin","orange ring button","layers","cube","split view","focus frame","check icon"]},{"title":"center widgets","position":"middle","count":8,"labels":["music player card","brightness slider with Auto","Focus Work dropdown pill","vertical plus-minus rocker","small vertical toggle with orange dot","tall volume slider","small dark circular button","thin vertical light slider with note icon"]},{"title":"secondary cards and controls","position":"lower middle","count":11,"labels":["Screen Mirroring card","AirDrop Everyone card","bottom utility strip with battery camera microphone hearing icons","horizontal temperature scale","media back button","media play button","media next button","heart button","shuffle button","repeat button","digital clock card"]},{"title":"bottom gauges and status","position":"lower","count":11,"labels":["lightning circular power gauge","75% circular ring","315° NW compass dial","dB -18 meter","ALT 1240 meter","navigation compass arrow","Active status pill","Notification pill","weekly weather forecast card","4 square utility buttons","bottom navigation icon row"]}],"bottom navigation count":13},"objects":{"connectivity pad":{"shape":"large rounded 4-way disc","quadrants":4,"icons":["airplane mode","wireless signal","wifi","bluetooth"],"active quadrants":1},"music player":{"artist":"{argument name=\"artist name\" default=\"Billie Eilish\"}","track":"{argument name=\"song title\" default=\"Ocean Eyes\"}","artwork":"abstract ocean wave image in teal tones","controls":4,"timeline":"1:45 to 3:20","extra":"audio waveform"},"weather main":{"temperature":"{argument name=\"temperature\" default=\"24°\"}","condition":"Cloudy"},"digital clock":{"time":"{argument name=\"clock time\" default=\"10:24\"}","date":"Tuesday, May 21","period toggle":"AM PM"},"forecast":{"current":"24° Partly Cloudy, H: 26° L: 18°","hourly count":6,"hours":["Now","11AM","12PM","1PM","2PM","3PM"]},"utility buttons":{"count":4,"icons":["timer","calculator","battery","record"]}},"color palette":{"count":5,"colors":["white","light gray","deep teal green","dark charcoal","soft orange"]},"camera":{"view":"straight-on top view","framing":"entire UI kit visible edge to edge"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"毛玻璃与拟态风格智能仪表盘 UI 套件","style":{"theme":"简洁的未来感移动端界面组件","background":"柔和的浅灰白色","materials":"磨砂玻璃、半透明亚克力、柔和阴影、微妙的内发光、圆角、浮雕与凹雕细节","accent color":"{argument name=\"accent color\" default=\"深青绿色\"}","secondary accent":"暖橙色","lighting":"左上方柔和摄影棚灯光、温和的环境反射、高光泽度","rendering":"超精细 3D UI 模型，高级 Dribbble 风格产品设计"},"layout":{"canvas":"方形构图","arrangement":"均匀分布的独立组件与控件网格","density":"信息密集但保持了充裕的留白平衡","sections":[{"title":"顶部控件行","position":"顶部","count":6,"labels":["四象限连接面板","模拟时钟","50% 电量环形仪表","24° 多云天气表盘","指南针","垂直温度滑块"]},{"title":"小型圆形快捷按钮","position":"中上部","count":11,"labels":["闹钟","月亮","静音铃铛","手电筒","定位图钉","橙色圆环按钮","图层","立方体","分屏视图","焦点框","勾选图标"]},{"title":"中心组件","position":"中部","count":8,"labels":["音乐播放器卡片","带自动调节的亮度滑块","专注工作下拉胶囊","垂直加减摇杆","带橙色圆点的垂直小拨动开关","高音量滑块","小型深色圆形按钮","带音符图标的细长垂直灯光滑块"]},{"title":"辅助卡片与控件","position":"中下部","count":11,"labels":["屏幕镜像卡片","AirDrop 所有人卡片","底部工具栏（含电池、相机、麦克风、听力图标）","水平温度刻度","媒体后退按钮","媒体播放按钮","媒体前进按钮","心形按钮","随机播放按钮","循环播放按钮","数字时钟卡片"]},{"title":"底部仪表与状态","position":"底部","count":11,"labels":["闪电环形电源仪表","75% 环形进度","315° 西北指南针表盘","dB -18 分贝计","海拔 1240 米","导航指南针箭头","活动状态胶囊","通知胶囊","每周天气预报卡片","4 个方形工具按钮","底部导航图标行"]}],"bottom navigation count":13},"objects":{"connectivity pad":{"shape":"大型圆角四向圆盘","quadrants":4,"icons":["飞行模式","无线信号","WiFi","蓝牙"],"active quadrants":1},"music player":{"artist":"{argument name=\"artist name\" default=\"Billie Eilish\"}","track":"{argument name=\"song title\" default=\"Ocean Eyes\"}","artwork":"青色调抽象海浪图像","controls":4,"timeline":"1:45 到 3:20","extra":"音频波形"},"weather main":{"temperature":"{argument name=\"temperature\" default=\"24°\"}","condition":"多云"},"digital clock":{"time":"{argument name=\"clock time\" default=\"10:24\"}","date":"5 月 21 日，周二","period toggle":"上午 下午"},"forecast":{"current":"24° 多云，最高 26° 最低 18°","hourly count":6,"hours":["现在","11AM","12PM","1PM","2PM","3PM"]},"utility buttons":{"count":4,"icons":["计时器","计算器","电池","录音"]}},"color palette":{"count":5,"colors":["白色","浅灰色","深青绿色","深炭灰色","柔和橙色"]},"camera":{"view":"正视俯视图","framing":"整个 UI 套件边缘可见"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 毛玻璃风格智能 UI 套件：一套精致且充满未来感的仪表盘界面套件，包含多种毛玻璃风格组件，非常适合 App UI 概念渲染、产品模型展示及设计作品集。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, soft light, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
